Home/A clearer path for wholesale buyers.

Commercial enquiries

A clearer path for wholesale buyers.

Commercial buyers need product specification, volume, packaging, destination and documentation—not a generic retail message. This page captures those details first.

Start wholesale enquiry →
ProductsDates and value-added formats
Buyer typeRetailers and food businesses
Quote basisProduct, volume and destination
SeasonalMango campaigns appear on Facebook

What buyers need to know

01

For retailers

Request product type, grade, pack size and order quantity. Current availability is confirmed directly.

  • Retail packaging enquiry
  • Bulk carton enquiry
  • Destination details
02

For food businesses

Date paste, syrup and powder may suit bakery or production use. Specifications and documentation require confirmation.

  • Required format
  • Monthly or one-off volume
  • Food-use requirements
03

For export enquiries

Facebook has promoted international seasonal shipments, but destination coverage and export terms must be reconfirmed for every campaign.

  • Country and city
  • Required quantity
  • Timeline and documentation

Direct, structured enquiry

Send the right details.
Get a more useful answer.
